competitors.name: Claude.ai / Anthropic
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Anthropic Claude new feature announcement July 13 2026 OR July 14 2026 (ok)
competitors.raw_snapshot: Tier1持续403，转WebSearch+直连Claude Code CHANGELOG核实。CHANGELOG版本从baseline记录的v2.1.207前进至v2.1.209：v2.1.208新增screen reader模式（--ax-screen-reader）、vimInsertModeRemaps设置、修复fast mode/session管理问题；v2.1.209修复'`claude agents` background sessions中/model等对话框被阻塞'的bug。Claude Cowork web/mobile扩展、Developer Platform release notes等其余内容与baseline重合，无新增。
competitors.content_hash: Tier1持续403，转WebSearch+直连Claude Code CHANGELOG核实。CHANGELOG版本从baseline记录的v2.1.207前进至v2

changes.description: Claude Code CHANGELOG新增v2.1.208（screen reader模式、vimInsertModeRemaps）与v2.1.209（修复background sessions中对话框被阻塞的bug）
changes.evidence: 「Fixed /model and other dialogs being blocked in `claude agents` background sessions」
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：这是background session的UI bug修复，浅层触及'session'关键词，但属于Claude Code自身CLI层面的稳定性修复，并非新的跨session/跨工具能力，与meee2锚点无结构性重叠

key_findings: Claude Code CHANGELOG本轮新增两个版本（v2.1.208、v2.1.209），均为辅助功能/vim按键/bug修复类小版本，无结构性新能力
Cowork web/mobile扩展、Developer Platform内容与baseline重合，无新进展

competitors.name: GitHub Claude Code 生态雷达
competitors.raw_snapshot: 数据质量提示：topic:claude-code查询星标数（20万+，如affaan-m/ECC 229579、NousResearch/hermes-agent 214745）延续此前多轮异常，继续不采信、不作威胁升级依据。四查询按full_name去重合并、按活跃度（pushed_at近30天或created_at近60天）过滤后，排除baseline（7/12）raw_snapshot已提及的全部仓库。本轮首次出现且满足活跃度条件的新仓库两个：(1) arcnid/peemux（'Terminal multiplexer for AI coding agents: run a wall of Claude/Aider/Cursor agents from one TUI'，2 star，created 2026-06-25，pushed 2026-07-13，命中terminal+agent 2项watch_keywords）；(2) C4RL05/agent-race-control（'Minimal terminal cockpit for Claude Code on native Windows: one window, all agent sessions unified'，1 star，created 2026-07-11，pushed 2026-07-14，命中terminal+agent+session+cockpit 4项watch_keywords）。另有shehab267/ccbrief（statusline工具，仅命中terminal 1项，未达阈值）为新仓库但不计入changes。三者均属于baseline已多次记录的'cockpit/terminal multiplexer'范式家族，非结构性新范式。本次items全量full_name列表（供下次去重，54个）：affaan-m/ECC, NousResearch/hermes-agent, farion1231/cc-switch, nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill, JuliusBrussee/caveman, thedotmack/claude-mem, Graphify-Labs/graphify, DietrichGebert/ponytail, addyosmani/agent-skills, Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything, shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code, rtk-ai/rtk, ComposioHQ/awesome-claude-skills, gsd-build/get-shit-done, ruvnet/ruflo, Leonxlnx/taste-skill, shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice, santifer/career-ops, iAmCorey/kooky, bitcoin21ideas/claude-statusline, lldong/tiny-trae, Postmodum37/simple-claude-code-statusline, shehab267/ccbrief, ferreirafabio/tailgrid, JoaoHenriqueBarbosa/agent-42, atxtechbro/test-ink-flickering, foolish-dev/teleia, Abhishek-Chougule/claude-cli-statusline, GaoSSR/best-claude-hud, meeghele/mini-ccstatus, suyash-thakur/clawnote, startupfundraising/claude-code-chat-bridge, Naberator/vs, jkrocil/claude-code-launcher, slpuh/claude-statusline, JananZZZ/color-cc, alchaincyf/fanbox, handmux/handmux, Surething-io/cockpit, dotdevdotdev/agentwire-dev, alexjbarnes/cockpit, arikechen/ATF, trevormil/TerMinal, nashory/agent-cockpit, jiliangarette/claude-code-pane, WillBe89/gitsidian, Rurutia-Artemis/rurutia, myounghalee/cockpit, arcnid/peemux, kunal-7x/claude-cockpit, juicerq/bankai, lxyer/multi-agent-collaboration-system, C4RL05/agent-race-control, rayngnpc/mkcrew
competitors.content_hash: 数据质量提示：topic:claude-code查询星标数（20万+，如affaan-m/ECC 229579、NousResearch/hermes-agent 214745）延续此前多轮异常

changes.description: arcnid/peemux——面向AI编码agent的终端多路复用器，可在单一TUI中同时运行多个Claude/Aider/Cursor agent
changes.evidence: 「Terminal multiplexer for AI coding agents: run a wall of Claude/Aider/Cursor agents from one TUI.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：多agent在单一终端界面并列管理，与meee2锚点1（人=慢session，AI=快session，同一协议）在'多session统一视图'层面有形态呼应，但仅为终端多路复用工具，无跨工具artifact live link或人在agent图内的协议设计，2 star规模极小，结构重叠有限

changes.description: C4RL05/agent-race-control——Windows原生Claude Code终端cockpit，统一管理所有agent session于单窗口
changes.evidence: 「Minimal terminal cockpit for Claude Code on native Windows: one window, all agent sessions unified.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：'unified agent sessions in one window'触及session统一管理概念，但属于baseline已多次记录的cockpit范式家族（与Surething-io/cockpit、Rurutia-Artemis/rurutia等同类），非新范式，1 star规模极小

key_findings: 重要数据质量提示：topic:claude-code查询星标数（20万+级别）持续异常，继续不采信
本轮两个新entrant（arcnid/peemux、C4RL05/agent-race-control）均属'cockpit/terminal multiplexer'范式家族的又一次重复验证，非新范式
shehab267/ccbrief为新出现的statusline工具，仅命中1项watch_keywords，未达阈值不计入changes
baseline已报告的仓库本轮均无法比较star跃升（raw_snapshot不保留历史star值），按设计不重复报告
